channel.title: Configuration on Jsonnet-as-a-Service
channel.description: Recent content in Configuration on Jsonnet-as-a-Service

item.title: Configuration reference
item.description:
Every JaaS flag below carries its default and a one-line description. Run jaas --help to see the same list at runtime. The tables are generated from the binary’s own flag definitions, so they never drift from the runtime contract.

The Helm chart exposes most flags under arguments.*; operator-specific flags are under operator.*. The full set of chart values is in the Helm chart values reference.

Jsonnet server

The Jsonnet server evaluates snippets and returns JSON. It binds on --listen-address:--port by default.

item.title: Reference
item.description:
Look-up material for exact values and release mechanics, generated from the binary and chart so it tracks the current contract.

  • Configuration reference — every flag with its default.
  • Helm chart values — every chart value with its default.
  • Verifying releases — check the signed image and binaries before you run them.
  • Upgrading — the actions required when moving between releases.
